title: epipactis muelleri var. dunensis
intro: Epipactis muelleri var. dunensis, also known as the Dun Helleborine, is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to Ireland. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbalism, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting immune function. Epipactis muelleri var. dunensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
